channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 18th July
item.description:
There is a plastic bottle on the road on Tabard Street. It has been there a day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 165, Great Dover Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter at the planters on Tabard Street, 18th July
item.description:
There are food packaging, bottles, cans and coffee cups on the planters and on the ground around the planters on Tabard Street. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo either of the tree, 18th July
item.description:
Tree outside 47 Buckingham rd. lots of dog poo either side of the tree. Please could you remove? There is a real big problem with dog poo on this stretch of pavement. Please could street cleaners report this and deal with it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buckingham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish by tree and all over pavement, 18th July
item.description:
Rubbish bag by tree with some rubbish behind and more rubbish by wall and car near the tree.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long metal pole, 18th July
item.description:
Metal pole appeared on pavement. It’s a hazard. Please remove.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forest Human and Lime Hire Bikes left abandoned, parked dangerously, 18th July
item.description:
Overcrowded Forest Human and Lime Hire Bikes left abandoned, parked dangerously and Blocked off the pavement completely, Swiss Court TWG Tea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster

item.title: Large amount of paving stones broken and raised., 18th July
item.description:
This a large trip hazard outside numbers 46 and 48 Leysdown Road for around 10 days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leysdown Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime Forest Human hire bikes parked on very overloaded Parking bay dangerously, 18th July
item.description:
Abandoned Lime Forest Human hire bikes parked on very overloaded Parking bay dangerously. Location: St Martins lane London Coliseum Theatre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32-35, St Martin's Lane, Covent Garden, City of Westminster

item.title: Overflown bin, 18th July
item.description:
The bin is overflowing one more time. Same every week. It is not being emptied regularly so we have to live with this every day of our lives

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bastion Road, Abbey Wood

item.title: Excessive littering of drink cans and takeaway, 18th July
item.description:
This area attracts excessive drinking and the large number of takeaways places nearby attract anti-social behaviour leading to this level of littering.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walworth Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit holders TP painted on LP 12, 18th July
item.description:

item.title: Previous tree work has not fully resolved the issue, 18th July
item.description:
I am requesting a further inspection of this council-owned tree. Following the recent pruning, the branches directly overhanging my driveway were removed, but the tree is still very large and continues to overhang my parking area and boundary wall. The tree continues to drop a significant amount of leaves, twigs and other debris onto my driveway and wall, requiring constant cleaning. I appreciate the work that has already been carried out, but I do not feel the issue has been fully resolved. I would be grateful if the tree could be reassessed and, if appropriate, further pruning could be considered. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree, 18th July
item.description:
Tree fallen or damaged outside 26 Unity Road EN3 Blocking pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Unity Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
